ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload map (launch) -> { id: launch.Id, name: launch.Name, projectId: launch.Demo_Project__c, projectName: launch.Demo_Project__r.Name default "", description: launch.Description__c default "", priceRangeMin: launch.Price_Range_Min__c default 0, priceRangeMax: launch.Price_Range_Max__c default 0, expectedHandover: launch.Expected_Handover__c default "", heroImageUrls: if (launch.Hero_Image_URLs__c != null) (launch.Hero_Image_URLs__c splitBy ",") map trim($) else [], amenities: if (launch.Amenities__c != null) read(launch.Amenities__c, "application/json") default [] else [], launchDate: launch.Launch_Date__c, isActive: launch.Is_Active__c default false, waitlistCount: launch.Waitlist_Entries__r.totalSize default 0 }

%dw 2.0 output application/json var launch = payload[0] --- { id: launch.Id, name: launch.Name, projectId: launch.Demo_Project__c, projectName: launch.Demo_Project__r.Name default "", description: launch.Description__c default "", priceRangeMin: launch.Price_Range_Min__c default 0, priceRangeMax: launch.Price_Range_Max__c default 0, expectedHandover: launch.Expected_Handover__c default "", heroImageUrls: if (launch.Hero_Image_URLs__c != null) (launch.Hero_Image_URLs__c splitBy ",") map trim($) else [], amenities: if (launch.Amenities__c != null) read(launch.Amenities__c, "application/json") default [] else [], launchDate: launch.Launch_Date__c, isActive: launch.Is_Active__c default false, currency: launch.Demo_Project__r.Default_Currency__c default "AED" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "Contact__c": vars.waitlistBody.contactId, "Project_Launch__c": vars.waitlistBody.launchId, "Preferred_Unit_Type__c": vars.waitlistBody.preferredUnitType, "Notes__c": vars.waitlistBody.notes, "Registration_Date__c": now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS'Z'"}, "Status__c": "Registered" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { id: payload.id, message: "Successfully joined the waitlist" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { sessionId: vars.sessionId, welcomeMessage: "Hello! I'm your PropHub assistant. How can I help you today? You can ask me about your unit status, payments, service requests, or upcoming launches." }
